module-1-inventory-correction-cleanup.label: Module 1 Project: Inventory Correction and Cleanup
module-1-inventory-correction-cleanup.summary: Correct audited inventory values and remove only two approved test records through six cumulative steps.

try_module_1_inventory_correction_cleanu.title: Remove the Remaining Draft Test Row
Preview the Audit Targets
try_module_1_inventory_correction_cleanu.prompt: An inventory audit flagged rows `2`, `4`, and `6` for review, but no changes are approved yet. In `query.sql`, preview those three rows by selecting exactly `id`, `price`, `status`, `is_test`, and `notes` from `inventory_items`.
try_module_1_inventory_correction_cleanu.hint: This is the first project step. Build a clean starting version, then run it before moving on.

help.concept: This module project is progressive. Each step starts from the previous working solution and adds one focused feature.
help.hint_1: This is the first project step. Build a clean starting version, then run it before moving on.
help.hint_2: Use the role or evidence named in the prompt instead of relying on answer wording.

try_module_1_inventory_correction_cleanu.starterCode:
-- Write your SELECT statement here
SELECT * FROM inventory_items WHERE id IN (2, 4, 6);
try_module_1_inventory_correction_cleanu.solutionCode: SELECT id, price, status, is_test, notes FROM inventory_items WHERE id IN (2, 4, 6);

query_sql.content:
-- Write your SELECT statement here
SELECT * FROM inventory_items WHERE id IN (2, 4, 6);
SELECT id, price, status, is_test, notes FROM inventory_items WHERE id IN (2, 4, 6);

try_module_1_inventory_correction_cleanu.title: Correct One Item Precisely
try_module_1_inventory_correction_cleanu.prompt: The audit confirms that item `id = 2` has the wrong price and status. Write a safe three-part script: preview `id`, `price`, and `status` for row `2`; update that row to `price = 8.25` and `status = 'active'`; then run the same focused `SELECT` to verify the correction.
try_module_1_inventory_correction_cleanu.hint: Begin with the working code from the previous step. Keep that code, follow the new comments, and add only the next focused behavior.

help.concept: This module project is progressive. Each step starts from the previous working solution and adds one focused feature.

help.hint_2: Run the previous working code first, then make only the focused change for this step.

try_module_1_inventory_correction_cleanu.title: Apply a Controlled Category Update
try_module_1_inventory_correction_cleanu.prompt: The operations team needs a consistent audit date on legitimate Decor inventory. Preview `id`, `category`, `is_test`, and `last_updated` for rows where `category = 'Decor'` and `is_test = 0`. Update only that set to `last_updated = '2026-02-10'`, then repeat the preview to verify it.
try_module_1_inventory_correction_cleanu.hint: Begin with the working code from the previous step. Keep that code, follow the new comments, and add only the next focused behavior.

try_module_1_inventory_correction_cleanu.title: Delete One Confirmed Test Item
try_module_1_inventory_correction_cleanu.prompt: The audit board has approved row `id = 4` for deletion. Preview its `id` and `name`, delete only that row, then select `id` and `name` for `id = 4` again; the verification should return no row.
try_module_1_inventory_correction_cleanu.hint: Begin with the working code from the previous step. Keep that code, follow the new comments, and add only the next focused behavior.

try_module_1_inventory_correction_cleanu.title: Remove the Remaining Draft Test Row
try_module_1_inventory_correction_cleanu.prompt: Row `id = 6` may be removed only if it is still both test data and in draft status. First preview `id`, `name`, `is_test`, and `status`. Delete with the full condition `id = 6 AND is_test = 1 AND status = 'draft'`, then verify that row `6` is gone.
try_module_1_inventory_correction_cleanu.hint: Begin with the working code from the previous step. Keep that code, follow the new comments, and add only the next focused behavior.

try_module_1_inventory_correction_cleanu.title: Complete the Operational Handoff
try_module_1_inventory_correction_cleanu.prompt: Prepare the final audit handoff as one cumulative script. Preview rows `2`, `4`, and `6`; correct row `2` to price `8.25` and status `active`; set `last_updated = '2026-02-10'` for non-test Decor rows; delete row `4`; delete row `6` only when it is a draft test row; then select the complete `inventory_items` table to show the final state.

sketch1.title: Inventory Correction and Cleanup Overview
sketch1.bodyMarkdown:
A makers-market inventory audit found three records that need attention. Item `2` has an incorrect price and status, legitimate Decor rows need a consistent audit date, and test rows `4` and `6` have been approved for removal under different conditions.

You are the inventory data steward. Build the cleanup carefully: preview targets before changing them, use narrow `WHERE` clauses, verify every mutation, and preserve all legitimate rows.

Your deliverable is one cumulative `query.sql` audit script that corrects item `2`, dates only non-test Decor items, removes row `4`, removes row `6` only when it is still a draft test row, and displays the final inventory state.
